headline: Clear calendar and empty comms — use this rare quiet Monday to drive the 'no ground truth' evals design doc forward before the next bi-weekly TR.

quick_wins.task: Fix Salesforce and Snowflake auth credentials so dashboards are available for the next bi-weekly TR
quick_wins.why: Both integrations are broken (invalid login / empty password); metrics will be needed for the upcoming Big Rock review

must_make_progress.task: Draft or significantly advance the 'Generated evaluations - clarify no ground truth' design doc (AE-1079)
must_make_progress.why: Only active Jira ticket, aligns directly with the Evals deliverable called out in the Big Rock TR; no meetings today means deep-work time is available

must_make_progress.task: Review Big Rock TR page for latest eval, agent runtime, and adoption metrics to inform your design doc assumptions
must_make_progress.why: The 3/18 TR captures current state on evals adoption, URT, and telemetry — ensures your design doc is grounded in real data

must_communicate_with.about: Align on scope and open questions for the no-ground-truth evaluation approach before writing the design doc

must_communicate_with.person_or_team: IT / DevOps (or whoever manages Salesforce & Snowflake integrations)
must_communicate_with.about: Report broken auth on both Salesforce and Snowflake; request credential reset

must_report_status.to: Agents PM leadership (likely surfaces at next bi-weekly TR)
must_report_status.note: Have at least a draft or outline posted to Confluence before next TR so stakeholders can async review

flags: Salesforce integration is down (INVALID_LOGIN) — escalations and customer cases are invisible until fixed.
Snowflake metrics integration is down (empty password) — no telemetry or funnel data available for dashboards or TR prep.
AE-1079 has no due date set — risk of silent deprioritization; consider setting a target date aligned to next TR cycle.
March telemetry data was noted as needing an update in the Big Rock TR appendix — may fall to you or a data partner.

outcomes.business_impact: No measurable business impact yet today; priority is restoring visibility into escalations (Salesforce) and metrics (Snowflake) so the team isn't flying blind.
outcomes.product_adoption: Evals adoption data is currently unavailable; advancing the no-ground-truth design doc (AE-1079) is the key lever to expand evals to customers who lack labeled datasets.

slack_summary: Quiet Monday with zero meetings — best use of the day is deep work on the 'no ground truth' evals design doc (AE-1079), your only active ticket. Top urgent items: (1) reach out to Adrian to align on design doc scope, and (2) flag broken Salesforce + Snowflake auth to IT so dashboards are live before the next TR. No meetings today.
